proposed_improvements.current: Writer fixture uses 'return BlobWriter()' inside 'with patch(...)' block, causing patch to exit before test body runs
proposed_improvements.improvement: Specify in prompt: 'Use yield inside with-patch blocks in pytest fixtures to keep the patch context manager active during test execution. Example: yield BlobWriter() instead of return BlobWriter()'

proposed_improvements.current: Prompt didn't specify error handling requirements for write_failed()
proposed_improvements.improvement: Add explicit requirement: 'write_failed() must catch all exceptions from upload_blob, log them with structured error context (blob_name, run_date_utc), and re-raise to preserve caller stack trace'

proposed_improvements.current: Prompt didn't require tests for error propagation paths
proposed_improvements.improvement: Add test requirement: 'Include tests for HttpResponseError propagation from write() and write_failed() to verify non-409 storage errors are not silently swallowed'

proposed_improvements.current: Prompt said use both overwrite=False and if_none_match='*' without explaining SDK interaction
proposed_improvements.improvement: Add note: 'When using azure-storage-blob, overwrite=False auto-injects If-None-Match:* when no conditions are present. Explicitly passing if_none_match="*" bypasses this auto-inject but achieves the same result. Add a clarifying comment explaining this interaction.'
